title: Ethiopian Kitfo with Rich Smoky Spice Blend
description: A traditional Ethiopian dish with a twist, featuring tender kitfo beef and a rich, smoky spice blend.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine the chopped kitfo beef and mitmita spice blend. Mix well to coat the beef evenly.
2. Heat the niter kibbeh in a large skillet over medium heat.
3. Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
4. Add the garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
5. Add the beef mixture to the skillet and cook to desired level of doneness, about 3-5 minutes for medium-rare.
6. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
7. Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro and serve immediately.
